text.title: AWS CLI Containers + IaC Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the shell script artefact artefact plus valid / invalid / forbidden examples.

section.title: Schema
Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: operation_type==ecs AND deployment bounds missing or out of range

example.title: No change-set + no rollback + no anchor
example.note: Multiple forbidden patterns triggered; reject and re-request.

text.reference: Validator script that enforces this contract.
